briefdescription.para: 8 blue bits, 8 green bits, 8 red bits
8 blue bits, 8 green bits, 8 red bits, alpha 8 bits
8 blue bits, 8 green bits, 8 red bits, and 8 ignored bits
8 red bits, 8 green bits, 8 blue bits
8 red bits, 8 green bits, 8 blue bits, alpha 8 bits
Enumeration for the instance when creating a native image, the color depth has to be specified.

simplesect.para: This ColorFormat follows pixel byte order.

briefdescription.para: Read access to the buffer (can read buffer contents)
Write access to the buffer (can modify buffer contents)
Enumeration for buffer access types when dequeuing buffers from the queue.

simplesect.para: These values can be combined using bitwise OR to specify multiple access types. For example: BufferAccessType::READ | BufferAccessType::WRITE

briefdescription.para: Enqueue and dequeue operations will be used.
Enumeration for queue usage types.
Creates a new NativeImageQueue. Depending on hardware, the width and height may have to be a power of two. It will use 3, or defined by DALI_TBM_SURFACE_QUEUE_SIZE as default.

parameterdescription.para: The color format of the image

simplesect.para: A smart-pointer to a newly allocated image

memberdef.argsstring: (uint32_t queueCount, uint32_t width, uint32_t height, ColorFormat colorFormat)
memberdef.name: New

briefdescription.para: Creates a new NativeImageQueue with the queue size. Depending on hardware, the width and height may have to be a power of two.

simplesect.para: Since queueCount can increase the memory usage, we recommened queueCount value is less or equal than 3.

parameterdescription.para: The number of queue of the image. If it is 0, will use default.
The color format of the image

simplesect.para: A smart-pointer to a newly allocated image

briefdescription.para: Creates a new NativeImageQueue from an existing native image.

parameterdescription.para: must be a any handle with native image

simplesect.para: A smart-pointer to a newly allocated image

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the internal native image.

simplesect.para: Any object containing the internal native image queue

briefdescription.para: Sets the size of the image.
Ignores a source image which is inserted to the queue.

simplesect.para: This can be called from worker threads.

briefdescription.para: Checks if the buffer can be got from the queue.

detaileddescription.para:
Check the available buffer using this API before call DequeueBuffer()
True if the buffer can be got from the queue.

briefdescription.para: Dequeue buffer from the queue.

detaileddescription.para:
Acquire buffer and information of the queue. It returns the information of the buffer.
width
The width of the buffer
height
The height of the buffer
stride
The stride of the buffer
A pointer to the buffer

briefdescription.para: Dequeue buffer from the queue with specified access type.

detaileddescription.para:
Acquire buffer and information of the queue with the specified buffer access type. It returns the information of the buffer.
width
The width of the buffer
height
The height of the buffer
stride
The stride of the buffer
type
The buffer access type (READ, WRITE, or READ|WRITE)
A pointer to the buffer

briefdescription.para: Enqueue buffer to the queue.

detaileddescription.para:
Enqueue buffer to the queue this requests the release of the buffer internally.
buffer
A pointer of buffer
True if success

briefdescription.para: Cancel dequeued buffer.

detaileddescription.para:
Cancel a buffer that was previously dequeued but not enqueued. This releases the buffer back to the queue without processing it.
buffer
A pointer to the buffer to cancel

briefdescription.para: Free all released buffers.
Sets a hint for queue usage type.

detaileddescription.para:
Call this method to specify what type of queue operations will be used. This hint allows the implementation to prepare appropriate queue management.
type
The queue usage type
This should be called before DequeueBuffer and EnqueueBuffer.

briefdescription.para: Get the number of queue count for this image.
Used for displaying native images.

detaileddescription.para: NativeImage is a platform specific way of providing pixel data to the GPU for rendering,for example via an EGL image. NativeImageQueue can be created internally or externally by native image. It has a queue which handles some image buffers. Someone should fill the buffers and enqueue them, then DALi will show them.
